name: zoho-expense
description: Reads and writes Zoho Expense API v1 resources through the declarative connector engine.

risk.read: external Zoho Expense API read of expense, report, organization, user, project, tax, currency, customer, trip, advance, and reporting tag data
risk.write: creates, updates, submits, approves, reimburses, archives, deletes, and otherwise mutates Zoho Expense resources; requires explicit approval
risk.approval: writes require explicit operator approval through the reverse ETL approval flow
